title: Acts 2 (feat. Michael W. Smith)
html: [Intro] Em7 C9 G G9/B [Primeira Parte] Em7 We are here in this place C9 Cause we are thirsty for You G G9/B Come, oh, God, Come, oh, God Em7 Fill this place with Your love C9 G We desire more of You G9/B More of You ( Em7 C9 G G9/B ) Em7 We are here in this place C9 Cause we are thirsty for You G G9/B Come, oh, God, Come, oh, God Em7 Fill this place with Your love C9 G We desire more of You D4 More of You [Refrão] C9 Em7 So come and set a fire G C9 D4 On the altar of my heart C9 Em7 Let me hear the sound of heaven G C9 D4 And behold you majesty ( C9 Em7 G C9 D4 ) [Segunda Parte] C9 We give you honor Em7 We give you glory G C9 Yours is the power D4 Forever, amen
